forbidden_scope: App UI, SDK/MCP full entrypoints, generated clients, or App integration
History list/search/filtering, database/ORM/migration tooling, multi-backend abstraction, hosted service storage, or result store
Browser/runtime executor, Harbor SDK/runtime calls, raw evidence retrieval, live sessions, or Harbor package imports
Harbor, Lode, App, or other repository changes
True-write behavior, write operation execution, write reconciliation, complex retry/recovery, or generic browser agent loops

integration_evidence.summary: Adds the schema-bound successful read-only Run Record fixture for run_fixture_success_001 using existing task/result/evidence refs.
Validates that the generated success Run Record matches the golden fixture and that the fixture can seed the file-backed store for run/result/evidence queries.
Documents that GH-108 provides the reusable fixture for later GH-109 smoke without adding smoke itself.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Single reusable fixture and conformance check over already-established contracts without API/CLI smoke, App integration, storage backends, raw evidence retrieval, or write behavior.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume ADR 0003/0005/0007/0008, the existing GH-101 through GH-107 contracts, the golden fixture, conformance output, GH-108 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when API/CLI smoke, write guardrails, generated clients, App UI, database storage, hosted service storage, real execution, or true-write behavior are added.

commands.note: Validated 4 schemas and 6 fixtures, including golden-read-only-run-record.fixture.json.
Validated conformance fixtures with 4 schemas, 6 fixtures, and 4 Run Records; generated success path matches the golden fixture and the fixture seeds query helpers.
Validated workspace self-checks; schemas report 6 fixtures and conformance reports 4 Run Records.
Validated conformance fixtures with 4 schemas, 6 fixtures, and 4 Run Records.

Consumer repo has no tools/ directory; tools/skills_surface.py check, tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only, tools/check_release_surface.py, tools/version_surface_check.py, and tools/check_npm_package.py are absent.

remaining_risks: GH-108 intentionally does not add API/CLI smoke, write-side guardrails, App UI, raw evidence retrieval, or true writes; GH-109 and GH-110 own those surfaces.
